hero.subtitle: From F-6 visa application to F-5 permanent residency — guided by data from 87 countries.

services.label: Services
services.subtitle: F-6 visa types 1–3 plus F-5 permanent residency. We guide you to the right visa for your situation.
services.f61Desc: For foreign spouses entering Korea for the first time. Full preparation from marriage documentation to guarantor requirements.
services.f62Desc: Visa renewal and status change while residing in Korea. Handles special cases including separation and divorce.
services.f63Desc: Special visa for foreign parents raising Korean-citizen children. Stay permitted even after divorce.
services.f5Desc: Apply for PR after 2+ years on a marriage visa. Comprehensive check of income, criminal, and stay history for the fastest path.

process.label: Process
process.subtitle: From first consultation to visa issuance and aftercare — a dedicated agent supports each step.
process.step1Desc: Explain your situation via KakaoTalk, LINE, or WhatsApp. Expert initial review within 24 hours.
process.step2Desc: Receive a custom checklist, identify missing documents, translation and notarization needs.
process.step3Desc: Translation and notarization in 4 languages. Country-specific notarization guidance.
process.step4Desc: In-person accompaniment or postal submission. Receipt shared immediately.
process.step5Desc: Entry registration after visa issuance, aftercare through first renewal.

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.heading: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.text1: From document prep to the embassy interview, I received thorough support in Vietnamese. Visa issued within 2 weeks of the interview!
testimonials.text2: I was guided precisely on how to get documents notarized in Moscow and handled it myself. Thank you so much.
testimonials.text3: A previously rejected case was reviewed again and finally approved. So glad I didn't give up.
testimonials.text4: Everything was explained in Thai, so I felt calm throughout. Not a single document was missing.
testimonials.text5: After over a year of waiting, I finally got my permanent residency. A thorough eligibility check meant I passed on the first try.
testimonials.text6: I was very anxious about coming to Korea for the first time, but every step including entry registration was handled with such care.

consult.formPrivacy: Your information is used only for consultation and will not be shared with third parties.
